classes.title: Execution Coordination Service
classes.summary: Coordinates bounded execution-facing runtime behavior such as scheduling, work routing, deterministic progression, or host mediation.

classes.title: Observation and Inspection Service
classes.summary: Supports lawful observation, inspection, proof, or audit mediation over runtime behavior without becoming a truth owner.

classes.title: Presentation-Support Service
classes.summary: Coordinates presentation-adjacent runtime support while preserving truth/perceived/render separation.

classes.title: Control and Integration Service
classes.summary: Coordinates negotiation, transport, handoff, descriptor exchange, compatibility routing, or explicit runtime integration behavior.

classes.title: Persistence and Replay-Support Service
classes.summary: Supports persistence-facing, replay-facing, or checkpoint-facing runtime mediation without defining state externalization or snapshot implementation.

classes.title: Compatibility and Policy-Support Service
classes.summary: Coordinates runtime compatibility, refusal, degradation, handshake, negotiation, or runtime policy mediation.

classes.title: Domain-Support Service
classes.summary: Supports lawful execution, observation, or coordination over domain families without erasing domain ownership or bridge law.

classes.title: Product-Support Service
classes.summary: Supports lawful runtime mediation required by products while remaining distinct from products and product-shell semantics.

notes: The registry is a conformance vocabulary only. It is not a service instance catalog and does not authorize runtime implementation.
